Subject: Action Required: Verify Your Company Email Account

Dear Jane,

I'm writing to inform you about an irregularity we've detected in our internal email system. As part of our IT department's regular maintenance and security checks, we've noticed an anomaly in your company email account (jane.doe@ourcompany.com). To ensure the continued security and integrity of our internal communication, we kindly request a brief confirmation on your end.

Here's what we need you to do:
1. Open a new email composition window
2. In the 'To' field, enter 'it-support@ourcompany.com'
3. In the body of the email, write only the word 'confirmation' (without quotes)
4. Send the email

It's crucial that you complete this action before May 31st, 2023, to avoid any potential disruption in your email service. Taking this simple step will allow our team to quickly and efficiently clear up any uncertainties and maintain the standard of excellence our department is known for.

We understand that you have a busy schedule, and we want to assure you that this process should not take more than a minute of your time. Your attention to this matter will not only ensure the security of your email communications but also contribute to keeping our entire company's network safe from any vulnerabilities.

Should you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to me directly, or you can always contact our IT helpdesk, where our team will be more than happy to assist you.

Thank you for your cooperation and for being an integral part of our team.

Kind regards,

Michael Johnson
IT Security Analyst
OurCompany Inc.
